[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *inknos* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman-py). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman-py/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [inknos] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

@Honny1 I believe the job yellow icons are stuck, because copr reports [all rpms are built](https://copr.fedorainfracloud.org/coprs/packit/containers-podman-py-581/build/9525044/). tests also run and passed, which depend on rpms, so we can move on I guess

Sure, pack it is not having good day. 
/LGTM
